description_long: This object consists of a row of six small, single-story bungalow houses arranged on a rectangular green base, resembling a miniature neighborhood block. Each bungalow features a pitched roof, with subtle variations in roof height and facade design, and is accompanied by a small blue rectangular area in front, likely representing driveways or walkways. The houses are spaced evenly apart, and the roofs are rendered in a muted brown color, while the base is a uniform green, suggesting grass or landscaping. The bungalows have simple, boxy shapes with clear, angular lines and minimal ornamentation. Windows and doors are visible as small, light-colored rectangles on the facades, contributing to a clean, modern suburban appearance. The overall composition suggests a planned residential development, with each unit mirroring the others in scale and style.
description: A row of six small, single-story bungalows with pitched brown roofs and blue driveways, set on a green rectangular base, evoking a suburban neighborhood block.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six bungalows lined up side by side, with their facades, roofs, and blue driveways clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of the green base and the sequential arrangement of the bungalows, highlighting the uniform spacing.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the bungalows and the green base, with rooflines and rear facades visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the row of bungalows from the other end, emphasizing the length of the arrangement.
